User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay for respectful crawling
=======
# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap

# Crawl-delay
Crawl-delay: 1

# Disallow admin and development areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /static/
Disallow: /temp/
Disallow: /backup/
Allow: /case-studies/
=======
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /.git/
Disallow: /automation/
Disallow: /scripts/

# Allow important pages
Allow: /services/
Allow: /ai-solutions/
Allow: /about/
Allow: /contact/
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /news/
=======
Allow: /case-studies/

# Crawl delay (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1
=======
Allow: /services/
Allow: /solutions/
Allow: /about/
Allow: /contact/
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /news/

# Crawl delay (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1
=======

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

User-agent: YandexBot
Allow: /
=======
Allow: /case-studies/

# Crawl delay
Crawl-delay: 1

# Block bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Screaming Frog SEO Spider
Disallow: /

# Rate limiting for aggressive bots
User-agent: *
Crawl-delay: 2
=======
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /services
Allow: /technologies
